lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: The forecast says rain all weekend.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] The forecast says rain all weekend.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: Of course it does. I finally booked that picnic spot.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [disappointed] Of course it does. I finally booked that picnic spot.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: We could do it indoors. Blanket on the floor, the whole thing.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] We could do it indoors. Blanket on the floor, the whole thing.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: Yes! No insects, no wind, unlimited snacks.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [excited] Yes! No insects, no wind, unlimited snacks.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: Okay... I'm actually starting to prefer this plan.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [warming up] Okay... I'm actually starting to prefer this plan. [long pause]
